seo.title: Little Rock Pride Festival — June 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Little Rock's annual Pride Festival fills Riverfront Park with live entertainment, community organizations, food vendors, and a parade through downtown. Central Arkansas's largest LGBTQ+ celebration.

description: The Little Rock Pride Festival is central Arkansas's largest LGBTQ+ celebration — a two-day event at Riverfront Park featuring a main stage with live musical performances and drag shows, a vendor village with community organizations, local businesses, and resource tables, food trucks along the river, and a family-friendly area on Sunday. Saturday opens with a Pride Parade through downtown Little Rock, starting on Markham and ending at the festival grounds. The event has grown steadily in scale and polish over the past decade and reflects a broader community embrace. Both days are free and open to all. The Saturday evening headliner performance is typically the festival's most attended single event; arrive early for good standing positions near the stage.

image.alt: Little Rock Pride Festival at Riverfront Park
